channel.title: Swift on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Swift on Arrans github.io

item.title: compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer
item.description: Run compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly

item.title: SwiftcordApp/Swiftcord
item.description: A fully native Discord client for macOS built 100% in Swift!

item.title: NativeScript/NativeScript
item.description: ⚡ Empowering JavaScript with native platform APIs. ✨ Best of all worlds (TypeScript, Swift, Objective C, Kotlin, Java, Dart). Use what you love ❤️ Angular, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue with: iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), Android (View, Jetpack Compose), Dart (Flutter) and you name it compatible.

item.title: CodeEditApp/CodeEdit
item.description: 📝 CodeEdit App for macOS – Elevate your code editing experience. Open source, free forever.

item.title: frol/completely-unscientific-benchmarks
item.description: Naive performance comparison of a few programming languages (JavaScript, Kotlin, Rust, Swift, Nim, Python, Go, Haskell, D, C++, Java, C#, Object Pascal, Ada, Lua, Ruby)

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: scriptingosx/DownloadFullInstaller
item.description: macOS application written in SwiftUI that downloads installer pkgs for the Install macOS Big Sur application.

item.title: traderepublic/Cilicon
item.description: 🛠️ Self-Hosted ephemeral macOS CI on Apple Silicon

item.title: httpswift/swifter
item.description: Tiny http server engine written in Swift programming language.
